basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iiti.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Indore Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with 2 years of experience or MD/MS/DNB in clinical branch.
qualification.details: MBBS with a minimum of 2 years of experience in the clinical branch in a recognised multispecialty hospital or MD/MS/ DNB in the clinical branch from a recognised hospital. NMC registration is essential. Experience in the clinical branch specially Medicine/ Family Medicine / ENT/ Orthopaedics/ Obs-Gynaecology/ Surgery/ Paediatrics/ Anaesthesia/ Psychiatry.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹3000/- per visit for MBBS, ₹5000/- per visit for MD/MS/DNB.
salary_details.details: For MBBS with 2 years of experience: ₹3000/- per visit for 6-8 hours of duty or 12 hours of night duty. For MD/MS/ DNB in the clinical branch: ₹5000/- per visit for 6-8 hours of day duty or 12 hours of night duty.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Medical Officer (Locum Duty) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with at least 2 years of experience in a clinical branch, or an MD/MS/DNB in a clinical branch from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Medical Officer (Locum Duty) position is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: Certificate Verification followed by an Interview or Interaction with the selection committee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply through email. The specific email address and further instructions are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer (Locum Duty) position?
faq.answer: For MBBS with 2 years of experience, the salary is ₹3000/- per visit. For MD/MS/DNB holders, it is ₹5000/- per visit.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Medical Officer (Locum Duty) position at IIT Indore.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The Medical Officer (Locum Duty) position is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
